parameters.query: SELECT access_token FROM config.temu_credentials WHERE app_key = 'db98a65eba39bf6886faf56e9249589e' LIMIT 1;

WITH upserted AS (
  INSERT INTO catalogs.categories (marketplace, category_id, category_name, is_active, last_synced_at)
  SELECT 'temu_ro', c->>'category_id', c->>'category_name', true, NOW()
  FROM jsonb_array_elements($1::jsonb) AS c
  ON CONFLICT (marketplace, category_id) DO UPDATE SET
    category_name  = EXCLUDED.category_name,
    is_active      = true,
    last_synced_at = NOW()
  RETURNING 1
)
SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS synced_count FROM upserted;

parameters.jsCode:
const syncedCount = $input.first().json.synced_count || 0;
return [{ json: { success: true, synced: syncedCount, marketplace: 'temu_ro' } }];
